CustomField.formula: IF(Salvation_Decision__c = TRUE, "Salvation ","") & IF(Recommitted_Life_to_Christ__c = TRUE, "Recommitted ", "") & IF(Invite_Others__c = TRUE, "Invite Others ", "") & IF(Lead_Small_Group__c = TRUE, "Small Group ", "") & IF( Local_Interest__c = TRUE, "Local", "")
CustomField.label: Response
